query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: resolve Drammen kommunenummer and get municipality geometry

2.description: select parcels (teig) in Drammen with area > 5000 m²

5.description: find parcels (step2) that intersect 200-year flood zones (step3)

6.description: compute nearest quick-clay distance from parcels (step5) to quick-clay polygons (step4)

7.description: sort parcels by nearest quick-clay distance ascending

executions.sql:
SELECT k.objid, k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, ST_Area(k.omrade::geometry) AS area_m2, k.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k;

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT t.objid, t.teigid, t.matrikkelnummertekst, COALESCE(t.lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(t.omrade::geometry)) AS aream2, ST_Centroid(t.omrade) AS geom_centroid, t.omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig t
WHERE t.kommunenummer = '3301' AND COALESCE(t.lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(t.omrade::geometry)) > 5000;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
SELECT f.objid, f.gjentaksintervall, ST_Area(f.omrade::geometry) AS area_m2, f.flomsoneid, f.lokalid, f.navnerom, f.versjonid, f.omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal f
WHERE f.gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT k.objid, k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, ST_Area(k.omrade::geometry) AS area_m2, k.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: nearest
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: sort
-- source_step: 6
-- order_by: "distance"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: limit
-- source_step: 7
-- limit: 10
